sectionTitle: Did You Bring Your Coat? | 外套帶了沒有？

samples.pinyin: yínháng nǔlì wěndìng huìlǜ.

samples.meaning: luckily; fortunately; as luck would have it
samples.sentence: 我倖虧走得早，才/纔沒被雨淋。

samples.meaning: luckily; fortunately; as luck would have it

samples.pinyin: xìngkuī nǐ tíxǐng wǒ, bùrán wǒ jiù wàngle.

samples.sentence: 難怪天氣這麼冷，今天下雪了。
